name: Community Savings
description_short: Community Savings is a CDFI-certified bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, and credit cards with digital banking tools and access to 40,000+ MoneyPass ATMs nationwide.
description_long:
Community Savings is a community-focused bank headquartered in Caldwell, Ohio, with a mission centered on serving underserved and underbanked populations. The organization achieved official certification as a Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI) by the U.S. Department of Treasury in January 2025, underscoring its commitment to providing financial services to underbanked communities across the United States. The bank has also earned a Five Star Superior Bank rating from BauerFinancial, indicating strong financial stability and performance metrics.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. On the retail side, this includes five MyChoice Checking account options, High-Yield Savings accounts currently earning 3.75% APY, Certificates of Deposit, Individual Retirement Accounts, credit cards, and MyChoice Mortgages with flexible terms and competitive rates. Business customers have access to dedicated online banking features, with new enhancements rolling out continuously. Community Savings also provides digital banking options including mobile banking, online account management, digital wallet integration (Google Pay, Apple Pay, Samsung Pay), and access to the MoneyPass network of 40,000+ surcharge-free ATMs.

Community Savings distinguishes itself through its CDFI certification, which reflects a deliberate focus on financial inclusion and community development rather than pure profit maximization. The bank has demonstrated growth and innovation, partnering with Narmi in 2024 to introduce digital account opening for both consumer and business customers, which drove millions in new deposits. The institution actively manages leadership transitions (appointing a President of Institutional Banking in 2023) and invests in accessibility features, as evidenced by AudioEye accessibility toolbar integration on their website.

As a regional community bank with CDFI status, Community Savings is best suited for consumers and small businesses seeking traditional banking services with a mission-driven provider. However, prospective customers should note that the website provides limited transparency on specific account fees, minimum balance requirements, mortgage rates, and credit card terms. While the 3.75% APY savings rate is competitive, actual rates and terms for other products require contacting the bank directly or logging into online banking. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business online banking with institutional features
Digital wallet payments (Google Pay, Apple Pay, Samsung Pay)
pros: CDFI-certified by U.S. Department of Treasury, demonstrating commitment to underserved communities
Five Star Superior Bank rating from BauerFinancial indicating financial stability
Access to 40,000+ surcharge-free MoneyPass ATMs nationwide
Five MyChoice Checking account options with flexible features
Digital wallet integration (Google Pay, Apple Pay, Samsung Pay)
Comprehensive mortgage products with flexible terms and competitive rates for qualified borrowers
cons: Website does not disclose specific account fees, monthly maintenance costs, or minimum balance requirements
Limited transparency on mortgage rates, terms, and APR ranges
Credit card terms, rewards, APR, and annual fees not detailed on website
Regional focus may limit branch accessibility for out-of-state customers
No information about CD rates or IRA investment options provided on main website
best_for: Underbanked and underserved consumers seeking inclusive banking with mission-driven lender
Small business owners requiring business checking and online banking solutions
Homebuyers in underserved communities seeking flexible mortgage options
Savers looking for competitive high-yield savings accounts with FDIC-insured institution
diagnosis: Community Savings is best for consumers seeking traditional banking services from a mission-driven, CDFI-certified institution focused on financial inclusion and community development. The main caveat is limited online transparency regarding specific fees, rates, and terms—prospective customers must contact the bank or log in to obtain detailed product information before making account or lending decisions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community Savings is a CDFI bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, credit cards, and 40,000+ ATM access.
